name: insurance brokers managing 5–15 policies/month tool
description: For insurance brokers processing 5–15 policies/month, missed renewal alerts cause client dissatisfaction. We provide timely renewal alerts instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets or paper files.
problem_solved: Difficulty in tracking policy renewals and coverage details.
